## Runtime.IRuntimeScaledFillingRecipeVersion.calculateGanache() method

Calculates ganache characteristics for this scaled version. Uses the scaled amounts, not original amounts.

**Signature:**

```typescript
calculateGanache(): Result<IGanacheCalculation>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;[IGanacheCalculation](./ts-chocolate.calculations.iganachecalculation.md)<!-- -->&gt;

Success with ganache calculation, or Failure if calculation fails
